Name: Izzy Boutique
Description:
Founder & CEO at Izzy Boutique | Redefining Footwear Retail in Kigali | Nationwide Delivery via DHL 

About Section:

 From a Single Vision to a Multi-Location & National Retailer

In February 2023, I founded Izzy Boutique with a simple yet powerful mission: to bring high-quality, stylish footwear and an unparalleled customer experience to the heart of Kimironko. What started as a premier local shoe destination has now blossomed into a growing retail brand serving customers across Rwanda.

I am thrilled to announce our latest milestone: the grand opening of our second Izzy Boutique location at Unity House, First Floor, Nyarugenge! This strategic expansion, coupled with our official partnership with DHL, marks a significant step in our journey to make premium sneakers and fashion accessible to all of Rwanda.

 What We Offer:

Curated Collections: Specializing in authentic, trend-forward sneakers from top brands like Nike, Adidas, and Puma.

Nationwide Delivery: Official DHL partnership for reliable, fast shipping across Rwanda.

Beyond Retail: A full-service footwear hub, offering expert shoe repair and customization.

Customer-Centric Experience: From our comfortable fitting spaces to our knowledgeable team, we ensure every visit is exceptional.

 Our Growth Philosophy:
Our success is built on a foundation of trust, quality, and a deep understanding of our customers' evolving needs. We are proud to be a part of the #RwandaBusiness growth story and are committed to contributing to the local economy and fashion landscape.

I am passionate about entrepreneurship, retail innovation, and building brands that customers love. Let's connect to discuss retail growth, logistics partnerships, and the future of fashion in Rwanda.

 Visit Us:

Kimironko Branch: The original home of Izzy Boutique. | Call: 0792686828

Nyarugenge Branch: Unity House, First Floor (KN 2 St). | Call: 0792106033

Nationwide: We deliver everywhere in Rwanda via DHL.

#IzzyBoutique

Name: Latin Shoes SA
Description:
Quiénes somos

Con 71 años de experiencia en el mundo del calzado, Latin Shoes es una empresa familiar argentina especializada en la distribución mayorista. Desde nuestros inicios en 1953, hemos evolucionado desde la fabricación de pantuflas y sandalias hasta convertirnos en referentes en la importación y comercialización de marcas reconocidas a nivel nacional e internacional.

En 2001 ampliamos nuestro negocio adquiriendo licencias exclusivas de marcas líderes. Hoy distribuimos más de 13 marcas, ofreciendo no solo productos de calidad, sino también herramientas estratégicas para potenciar el crecimiento de nuestros clientes.

Nuestros Canales de Distribución

Contamos con un equipo comercial distribuido estratégicamente en todo el país, asegurando una sólida presencia en el mercado con más de 5.000 puntos de venta en el canal minorista. Con más de 1.300 clientes activos, en Latin Shoes entendemos las necesidades del mercado y trabajamos junto a nuestros clientes para ayudarlos a crecer.
Location: Buenos Aires, Ciudad Autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: Briggs Industrial Footwear Limited
Description:
Briggs Safety Wear has over 70 years of experience in meeting customers’ personal protective equipment needs. We market our product through a selective number of trusted supply partners and support this network of distributors with technical support, a fast in-stock service, field support and a tailored extensive marketing programme. 
 
Our customers find that we are straight talking - we will tell you if there’s a more cost-effective solution, if a design can be improved or if you are using the right product. Highly innovative in product development our Himalayan brand is the market leader within the £30 -£50 RRP price point market for safety footwear. We have the perspective of lots of industries, including automotive, aerospace, logistics, utilities, oil & gas and marine and our extensive knowledge is at our customers’ disposal to help solve their problems, cost effectively. Within our parent company we have our own competitive factories but also fully accredited partners in Asia where lowest costs are the key factor.
 
If you are looking for world renowned branded safety products such as Dr Marten, Himalayan, Caterpillar, Toesavers, Proforce, Timberland, SecurityLine and UnBreakable with a competent and secure back-up service then please call our business to business Sales Order Line on 0116 2444 700 or email marketing@briggssafetywear.co.uk

Name: CYCLEUR de LUXE
Description:
The Belgian based CYCLEUR de LUXE brand was launched in 2012 as a part of Vanneste Lifestyle Group. 

Since then, the brand was successfully sold through an increasing dealer network with more then 700 mid- to high-end footwear doors and sportswear stores in Europe and more recently also in the USA 

The brand focuses on all consumers who love sports and cycling and want to incorporate the sports fashion culture into daily lifestyle. Cycleur de Luxe takes an innovative design angle, featuring detailed trims referring to the world of cycling and other sports . The brand offers a wide range of woman & men sneakers , casual shoes and functional day& travel packs as well more recently lifestyle apparel has hit the shelves . Cycleur de Luxe has been proud partner of worlds’ best cyclists like Jonas Vingegaard and Wout Van Aert through Jumbo Visma, the lion of Flanders Johan Musseeuw and soccer teams like soccer teams Ado Den Haag , Fc Utrecht or sport influencers like sport journalists Ruben Van Gucht …, The brand is expanding categories with Cycleur DLX after sport sneakers, Re>Cycleur ( eco friendly & sustainable , degradable sneakers ) , and Cycleur de Luxe apparel. We are looking to partner up with local retailers around the globe and will are launching phygital experience pop up or franchise under the name Cycleurs’world soon . 
It’s our long term goal , to style as many fan of sports around the world and inspire others to join a healthy lifestyle . With our #cycleurmovement we want people to share pictures of their healthy and Cli-Mate-Cool lifestyle . We are keen on manufacturing Cycleur products in the best sustainable way while keeping an eye for balanced commercial value too. More info about us visit www.Cycleurdeluxe.com. Questions or info please mail marketing@cycleurdeluxe.com

Name: Marila Shoes (Neox Calzados, S.L.U.)
Description:
We are Marila.
Desde Elche, ciudad zapatera europea por tradición y experiencia artesanal, es el perfecto enclave estratégico por ubicación y logística, desde donde Marila diseña y fabrica cada temporada sus nuevas colecciones de bellísimos zapatos, llenos de creatividad y calidad.

Fabricado por nuestros expertos artesanos.
La elaboración de nuestros zapatos, conlleva muchos y variados procesos en su mayoría artesanales, no sería posible conseguir la alta calidad de Marila sin la participación de nuestros expertos artesanos, que ponen todos su saber hacer para que el resultado sea siempre excelente, y el cliente disfrute desde el primer paso de un calzado autenticamente Premium, en diseño, comodidad y moda.

Con pieles de primera, de curtición natural.
La piel, utilizada por Marila, es la mejor materia prima que existe. Al estar en contacto con nuestra propia piel, la seleccionamos por sus especiales características se suavidad, transpirabilidad y flexibilidad, es completamente ecológica y en su curtición se utilizan tintes naturales sin plomo ni metales pesados. Calzarse nuestros zapatos es una experiencia única que el que lo prueba repite.

Creaciones con las últimas tendencias de moda y confort.
Nuestros diseños, siguen las tendencias de última moda, que muchas veces incluyen tacones de vértigo y altas cuñas, pero Marila siempre se se adaptan al pie, envolviéndolo sin comprimirlo, respetando su forma natural y ergonomía, para que andar sea un verdadero placer, con tacones, cuñas o planos, Marila es sinónimo de confort.

Marca reconocida internacionalmente.
Actualmente exportamos el 60% de nuestra producción, a los más exigentes mercados internacionales, gracias a nuestra excelente relación calidad - precio (de las mejores del mercado) los atractivos modelos, su alta rotación, la rapidez y agilidad de nuestro servicio de entrega, y nuestras certificaciones de calidad, nos ha permitido ser una marca muy apreciada por consumidores y distribuidores internacionales.

Name: SKECHERS SINGAPORE PTE LTD
Description:
SKECHERS originated from a south California slang, which means "energetic youngsters". SKECHERS designs, develops and markets a diverse range of footwear for men, women and children.
 
Born in a small beachside California community in 1992, SKECHERS has grown from a one-style, one-building company to be one of the world famous footwear brands. SKECHERS is now the No.2 footwear brand in the United States (according to Sporting Goods Intelligence) and was named Company of the Year by Footwear Plus for the 5th time in 6 years (2005, 2006, 2008, 2009, 2010).
 
The Skechers Fitness Group have also hit the market by storm in the rapid growing toning footwear market and has captured 60% market share of the U.S. toning market in 2010. Shape-ups was named "Launch of the Year 2009" by Footwear News.
 
Skechers has also partnered with renowned celebrities including Britney Spears, Ashlee Simpson, Christina Aguilera, David Cook. In 2011, Kim Kardashian, Brooke Burke, American Football legend Joe Montana, Basketball Hall of Famer Karl Malone & Hockey Legend Wayne Gretzky represented different collections. In Hong Kong, young singer G.E.M. was the spokesperson followed by superstar Sammi Cheng.
 
There are now over 500 SKECHERS company-owned and franchised or licensed stores in some of the most attractive locations in over 40 countries across 6 continents.

Name: Wenzhou DelinShoes Co.,Ltd
Description:
The Delin Shoes Import&Export Group was founded in 2009 with one mission: to produce stylish, quality footwear at a great value. The company was started by three shoemakers who combined their wealth of shoe industry experience to reopen a recently shuttered factory in Wenzhou,ZheJiang Province, the historical home of Chinese Shoe's Capital.

Today, We have a professional designing team and 3 production lines to provide services of footwear design, manufacturing, and sales in one of the whole processes. 

The current commodity of the company covers Sandal, Boots, Fashion Dress Shoes, Casual Men's Shoes, and Gentlemen Shoes. Our company is entitled as national "High-integrity Enterprise". 

We have traded with  Primark, River Island, Steve Madden, Walmart,NEXT,BOOHOO and passed the third-party audit they applied. In 2020, the factory produced around 2M pairs with a total value of $ 20M. We build solid trade relationships with over 30 countries around the world, such as the UK,FRANCE, SPAIN, USA, Canada, Japan, Southeast Asia, South America, and etc. We will continue to adhere to the principle of "reputation first, customer first", provide the best products and quality services for each of our customers.

Name: COLTENIS
Description:
COLOMBIANA DE TENIS S.A. - COLTENIS

Nacimos en Cali, Valle del Cauca, Colombia en 2008, como distribuidores de Lacoste Footwear para tiendas multimarcas, con el fin de posicionarlas en territorio nacional.
Nos convertimos en representantes de marcas con alto reconocimiento internacional y en 2010 incursionamos en el canal RETAIL con tiendas propias y franquicias en las principales ciudades de Colombia, iniciando por Bogotá, Medellín y Cali.
En 2019 nos expandimos hacia la nueva tendencia de e-commerce, marketplaces y páginas oficiales de algunas de las marcas que representamos en Colombia.
Estamos en el Top 10 de importadores de calzado en el país, con más de 1 millón de unidades vendidas en los últimos 3 años, siendo una de las 500 empresas con mayores ventas en el Valle del Cauca.
Nuestro principal objetivo es ofrecer al mercado nacional productos exclusivos, casuales y con alta calidad que permitan identificarnos como una empresa líder, confiable, segura y que está en continua adaptación a las tendencias globales.

Name: Wrapton Footwear and Accessories
Description:
Based in Southern California, co-founded by Reine Krief, owner and designer of BijouRocks, and Michael Krief, president of Krief Design Studio LLC, Wrapton is the result of two generations of accumulated experience in both the footwear and fashion industries. A foundation of years of research and design for several brands with worldwide distribution and a shift in the market towards sustainability prompted the husband and wife design team to fill the need for eco-friendly leather shoes that look good, feel great and won’t break the bank. Wrapton was born of love, respect and tradition.

Established in 2021 Wrapton footwear was finally realized from Reine's inspiration of aesthetic, color, and texture, and Michael’s expertise in footwear design and production. Together they created elevated Euro-comfort, luxurious eco-friendly leather shoes, made in the hills of Portugal.

Today, Wrapton shares a beautiful creative space with BijouRocks, located in the arts district of Solana Beach, California. The shop and showroom showcases the latest collections, serves as a space for private events and a gallery for fine art exhibits.

Name: Smart Fashion House
Description:
Step into a world of style, comfort, and sustainability with Smart Fashion House!
Welcome to Smart Fashion House, where fashion meets with comfort and sustainability in every step you take. We are a global footwear brand dedicated to creating shoes that not only look great but feel great too. Our mission is to provide trendy, durable, and eco-friendly footwear that caters to the diverse needs of modern consumers. Whether you're looking for stylish everyday wear, performance-driven athletic shoes, or elegant leather pieces, Smart Fashion House has something for everyone.

At Smart Fashion House, we believe that footwear should enhance your lifestyle, not just complement it. That’s why we prioritize using sustainable materials, innovative designs, and ethical production processes in every pair we craft. We are committed to making a positive impact, from reducing our environmental footprint to delivering products that offer long-lasting comfort and support.

Our collection is carefully curated to reflect current fashion trends while ensuring the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship. We serve a diverse community of customers who value uniqueness, sustainability, and timeless style. With our focus on continuous innovation, we aim to stay ahead of the curve, delivering footwear that resonates with the values of today’s conscious consumers.

Join us on our journey to revolutionize the footwear company—one stylish, comfortable, and sustainable step at a time. Stay connected with Smart Fashion House for the latest product updates, fashion inspiration, and exciting collaborations. Together, let's walk toward a more stylish and sustainable future!

Name: Panway
Description:
Panway is a next-generation footwear company built at the intersection of culture, commerce, and global retail. With over three decades of family heritage in footwear, we combine deep industry expertise with a contemporary vision—bringing licensed, private-label, and branded collections to market at scale.

We are proud partners in relaunching and growing iconic names like Baby Phat, Phat Farm, and Palm Angels, while also developing innovative in-house and private-label programs that meet today’s consumer where they live, shop, and move.

From design and development to manufacturing, distribution, and retail partnerships, Panway delivers full-service solutions that blend style, speed, and scale. Our products live everywhere—from luxury-inspired streetwear capsules to value-driven retail programs—always with a focus on quality, culture, and reach.

At Panway, every step is about building the future of footwear.

Name: Hangzhou Nanbo Footwear Co.,LTD
Description:
About Hangzhou Nanbo Footwear Co., Ltd.

Founded in 2013 and operating independently since October 2022, Hangzhou Nanbo Footwear Co., Ltd. is a specialized manufacturer and exporter of high-performance safety and tactical footwear.
We proudly design, develop, and distribute under our own brand: **TREES CASTLE** — a name that reflects durability, protection, and responsibility.

---

  What We Do

We focus on producing **safety footwear** and **tactical boots** for industrial, military, emergency, and professional service environments. From fire-fighting boots to nurse and cabin crew shoes, our collections are built to protect with comfort and reliability.

As an OEM/ODM partner, we also provide customized design and sourcing services for clients worldwide.

---

 Global Reach & Responsible Manufacturing

With professional teams across China and deep partnerships in Europe, North America, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia, we understand the diverse needs of global markets.
Our close collaboration with 3–4 key production bases ensures consistent quality, reliable delivery, and strict production oversight.

---

  Our Mission

Foot protection in any environment.
We’re committed to delivering safe, comfortable, and eco-conscious footwear for people who work in demanding environments. Our goal is to be a trusted supplier across China and Southeast Asia, known for integrity, long-term partnerships, and transparent pricing.

---

 Why Choose Nanbo?

* **Category Focus**: Experts in safety shoes and tactical boots
* **Flexible Production**: Small-batch or large-scale solutions
* **One-stop Sourcing**: From concept to finished product
* **Global Logistics**: Export-ready with full supply chain support
* **Tailored Service**: We listen, adapt, and deliver what you need

---

Room1501, Building2, Xiaoshan International Business Center

Name: Bocciolini
Description:
Bocciolini-From Leather Scraps to Meaningful First Steps

Bocciolini was born from a simple idea: proving a small brand can create fashion that is responsible and human. We turn reclaimed nappa leather, once waste, into soft, hand-finished baby shoes. What began as a tiny craft project has become a micro-brand mixing Italian design, Mediterranean craftsmanship, and a vision rooted in Vienna.

Our Story
We give new life to precious materials and protect children’s first steps. Each pair is made in very small batches, with a transparent supply chain and a design that supports natural, flexible movement. Our bows, fringes, and loops come from reusing small leather pieces.

We use the sacchetto construction, a refined Italian method where the upper is sewn around a soft inner “sac.” No seams rub the heel, and the shoe adapts naturally to the foot, the same technique used for luxury slippers, chosen for comfort.

From Workshop to Digital
We started offline, with prototypes and first customers, then launched e-commerce to meet parents online while keeping our artisanal soul.

Packaging That Lasts
Each pair comes in a velvet keepsake box, reducing waste and giving families something to treasure.

Respect for Nature
We recover leather scraps from other companies, lowering waste and avoiding polluting disposal.

Production & Quality
Every pair is hand-checked before shipping. We manage logistics directly for accurate stock and fast delivery.

Our Philosophy
Fashion can have a soul: reclaimed materials, breathable shoes, honest pricing, small batches, and a conscious community.

From Waste to Worth. Fashion that values, not wastes.

Description:
PAPS - Premium Home Comfort - Nederland

 We hebben onze jarenlange ervaring gebruikt om unieke, perfecte medische slippers te creëren. 
Nauwe samenwerking met podotherapeuten, orthopedische technici en andere experts lag ten grondslag bij het ontwerpproces van Paps.
 
 PAPS podotherapeutische huisschoenen worden aanbevolen voor zowel wanneer je reeds steunzolen gebruikt in jouw (buiten-) schoenen en daarnaast ook ‘gezonde’ pantoffels zoekt voor gebruik binnenshuis en in de tuin, als voor mensen zonder voetproblemen zijn PAPS huisschoenen een geweldige manier om het dagelijks leef comfort aanzienlijk te verhogen en toekomstige problemen te voorkomen.

 Onze voetspecialisten hebben ons product ontworpen met het speciale aandacht op grote groep mensen met gevoelige voeten (neuropathie, diabetes).

 PAPS worden gemaakt met gebruik van fijnste materialen, echter zonder oog te verliezen op het milieu. Duurzaamheid staat bij ons centralen gedurende het hele productieproces. Deze zit niet alleen in de keuze van de materialen die worden gebruikt, maar ook in duurzame supply chain, en energie-efficiency van productieproces zelf.

In addition to earning commissions on your own sales, you can also earn commissions on the sales generated by the candidates you recruit to join our team. This makes SneakersMonsters a great opportunity for anyone who is looking to build a profitable business in the sneaker industry.

We sell millions of pairs of shoes globally every year, ensuring that from our initial designs to the final delivery to you, we never sacrifice quality. We carry out regular quality checks and inspections on shoes before they ship.
Decades of work importing and exporting footwear globally has given us a lean and efficient supply chain backed by global logistics networks and relationships. We offer both air freight and sea shipping options to our customers, with no maximum order quantity constraints.
We have a truly global supply chain infrastructure and currently ship to customers on every continent. Our team and network of both Turkey based, and international couriers enabling us to deliver on-time, every time.
We offer our clients the ability to place bespoke made to order shipments once a required MOQ is met. For these orders, clients can order and colour or style they want, with their own box design and inside sock logo. For more information about this, please reach out us by e-mail.

Description:
MAKRO AYAKKABI, 2014 yılından bu yana kadın ayakkabısı sektöründe faaliyet göstermektedir. 

Türkiye'nin birçok yerinde bayilere sahip olan MAKRO AYAKKABI, aynı zamanda 18 farklı ülkeye ihracat yapmaktadır. Bu geniş dağıtım ağı, bizim global bir marka olma yolunda ilerlememizi sağlamaktadır.

Misyonumuz, müşterilerimize en yüksek kalitede ürünleri sunmak ve onların yaşamlarını daha konforlu hale getirmektir. Biz, her bir müşterimizin memnuniyetini sağlamak için çalışıyoruz ve bu, işimizin merkezinde yer alıyor.

MAKRO AYAKKABI olarak, sektördeki yenilikleri yakından takip ediyor ve ürünlerimizi sürekli olarak geliştiriyoruz. Bu sayede, müşterilerimize her zaman en iyi ve en güncel ürünleri sunabiliyoruz.

Name: Nicoboco Shoes
Description:
En Nicoboco no seguimos tendencias, seguimos caminos.

Desde el primer boceto hasta la última pisada, diseñamos cada modelo con un objetivo claro: que sientas el confort, la ligereza y la libertad desde el primer paso. Somos una marca que nace del movimiento. Del viaje, del paseo, del plan que se improvisa. Por eso, cada una de nuestras colecciones está pensada para acompañarte allá donde te lleven tus ganas: la ciudad, la playa, la montaña… o tu propio sofá.
Fabricamos con primeras calidades, materiales técnicos y acabados resistentes. Porque sabemos que un buen diseño no sirve de nada si no puede seguirte el ritmo. Esto no va solo de calzado. Va de actitud. De caminar a tu manera, sin prisa, sin filtro y sin perder nunca el estilo.
Nicoboco. Calzado hecho para vivirlo.

No se trata solo de llegar, sino de cómo lo haces.
En Nicoboco creemos que cada paso es una oportunidad de disfrutar, descubrir y ser tú mismo.
Y si encima vas cómodo… mucho mejor.

Name: Julieta Barcelona
Description:
The guiding principle of Julieta is simple: there is no better luxury than comfort, especially when it comes to shoes. It started in 2015 when we decided to solve a long-standing problem. We set out to make a high heel as comfortable as it is beautiful—one with enough support, style and versatility to take any professional woman from the boardroom, to baggage claim and back again.

Each design is created with our professional insights as doctors, sculpted around the latest research in biometrics and crafted with the expertise of traditional Spanish shoemaking. Simply put, Julieta shoes make your every step feel and look good without compromise.

Name: ProtectXXL.nl
Description:
ProtectXXL.nl is dé webshop voor zakelijke klanten die werkschoenen nodig hebben. De filosofie achter werkschoenen in het algemeen is anders dan die van andere aanbieders. Het doel van ProtectXXL.nl is om werkschoenen te verkopen die niet alleen voldoen aan de hoogste veiligheidseisen maar ook goed zijn voor uw voeten. Uw voeten zijn het fundament van uw gehele lichaam. Wanneer u geen rekening houdt met het dragen van goede werkschoenen is de kans groot dat er zich in uw hele lichaam gebreken kunnen voordoen. Denk hierbij aan knieklachten, rugklachten en nog veel meer. Alle werkschoenen op deze website zijn alvorens ze geplaatst zijn, uitgebreid getest en onder andere gedragen door medewerkers van PROTECTXXL.nl, 

PROTECTXXL.nl is dé specialist in werkschoenen en heeft daarom deskundige medewerkers die altijd voor je klaar staan. Heb jij of je werknemers klachten over  werkschoenen of weet je niet welke werkschoenen geschikt zijn, neem dan contact op met de klantenservice. 

Buiten het goed adviseren en positioneren van mensen in werkschoenen wil ProtectXXL.nl haar klanten zo goed mogelijk ontzorgen. Dat wil zeggen dat men ernaar streeft om jou als klant te ontlasten tijdens het bestel- en leveringsproces. Zo is er de mogelijkheid om op naam van je medewerkers te bestellen, zodat de werkschoenen op persoonsniveau kunnen worden uitgeleverd. Ook is het mogelijk om uw orderhistorie en maatgegevens terug te zien, zo is het altijd inzichtelijk hoe lang iemand zijn/haar werkschoenen draagt en welk model zij hebben. Kortom, ben je op zoek naar goede werkschoenen en wil je goed geholpen worden, dan is ProtectXXL.nl de partij die bij je past!

Je kunt ook terecht in onze showroom waar wij de nieuwste meetapparatuur hebben staan om je optimaal in jouw werkschoenen te positioneren.

We support clients from concept to sampling and participate in global trade shows including Las Vegas Show, FFANY, and Atlanta Show.

 Full Product Range & Market-Driven Design
Each year, we release 100+ new styles created by our in-house design and R&D team, blending global trends with local tastes. Our product range includes fashion shoes, pumps, loafers, sneakers, sandals, slippers, boots, and kids’ shoes, crafted from genuine leather, PU, textiles, and eco-friendly materials.

 Quality That Inspires Confidence
With a monthly capacity of 300,000–500,000 pairs, CHAMPMAX provides both ODM originality and OEM customization. Our factory complies with BSCI, Sedex, and ISO9001 standards, and products meet REACH, CPSIA, and CA65 requirements. 

 Flexible Orders & Efficient Logistics
We offer MOQs of 300–500 pairs with mix-color/style flexibility and quick reorders. Samples in 7–10 days, bulk in 30–60 days. FOB, CIF, and DDP supported with 8–12% logistics savings.

 Sustainability & Retail-Ready Packaging
Eco-conscious materials and low-chemical processes are integral to our collections. We also offer custom packaging, hangtags, and story cards, plus e-commerce support with size charts, product images, and reverse logistics data.

CHAMPMAX — your agile, design-forward, and quality-assured footwear manufacturing partner in Latin America, North America, and Europe.

Name: Jump Türkiye
Description:
1986 yılında tescilini Genmar İç ve Dış Ticaret A.Ş. çatısı altına aldığımız uluslararası JUMP markası, Türkiye ayakkabı sektörüne öncülük yapan firmalardan biridir.


     800’ün üzerinde satış noktası olan ve büyük zincir mağazalarda bulunan markamız günden güne bünyesine yeni satış noktaları ekleyerek ayrıca trendler ve modaya uygun yeni ayakkabılar üreterek sektöre hizmet vermektedir.


     Tamamıyla yerli üretime sahip JUMP markası olarak, Avrupa standartlarına uygun yeni ürünlerin üretilmesi, mevcut bir ürünün geliştirilmesi, iyileştirilmesi, ürün kalitesini veya standardının yükseltilmesi, maliyet düşürücü nitelikte yeni tekniklerin, yeni üretim teknolojilerinin geliştirilmesi gibi konularda Ar-Ge faaliyetlerinde bulunuyoruz.


     Hizmet politikamızı; kaliteli, uygun fiyatlı ürünler, erken üretim, hızlı teslimat, ileri teknoloji ve modaya uygunluk olarak belirledik. Her yaş grubuna hitap eden tasarım ve üretim gücümüzle her geçen gün pazar payımızı korumakta ve geliştirmekteyiz.


     2019 yılında jump.com.tr ve Türkiye’nin önde gelen online pazar yerleri ile başlayan perakende e-ticaret serüvenimiz genç ve alanında uzman kadromuzla müşteri odaklı çalışmayı benimseyerek, güçlü stoklarımız, zamanında teslimat, geri iade kolaylığı gibi katma değerli servislerimizle her yıl büyümeye devam etmektedir.

Name: Green T Footwear
Description:
Green T Footwear is a Cape Town-based brand on a mission to change the way the world wears shoes.

After two decades in the global footwear industry, we launched Green T to create a better alternative — one that’s stylish, comfortable, and truly sustainable. Our sneakers are made using post-consumer recycled plastic, recycled rubber, and post-consumer recycled PU — carefully designed to reduce environmental harm without compromising on quality or design.

We believe that good design can coexist with good values. Every pair of Green T's is built with timeless, minimalist style, maximum comfort, and the planet in mind. We’re not here to greenwash. We’re here to walk the talk — by using better materials, reducing waste, and encouraging a shift toward slow fashion.

 Designed in Cape Town
 Made using recycled materials
 Built for everyday wear — by everyone
 Focused on growing into more sustainable categories

We know we’re not perfect — but we’re committed to doing better every day. And we invite you to walk this journey with us.

Join the movement. Wear the change.

Visit: www.greentfootwear.co.za
Follow: @greentfootwear

Name: Aerowalk Danmark ApS
Description:
Aerowalk Danmark har siden 2015 stået for importen af Aerowalk sandaler til det danske marked. Aerowalk sandalerne bliver produceret i Indien og er helt fantastiske at have på fødderne. Sandalerne bliver lavet på fabrik, men næsten alle produktionsled foregår ved håndkraft. Derfor kommer der et super godt produkt ud af det.

Aerowalk sandalerne, er både super smarte og samtidig i så god kvalitet, at du kan gå i dem i timevis. Gummisålen er af 100% polyurethan, hvilket gør Aerowalk sandalerne stærke og holdbare men samtidig utrolig lette og bløde det er virkelig ‘value for money’

Aerowalk har tykke såler med en god stødabsorberende hæl, som dæmper stød i ryggen. Sandalen er støbt med en god pasform, så din fod bliver i sandalen. En anden god egenskab er, at sålerne ikke tager imod lugt fra varme fødder.

Sandalens mange gode egenskaber, gør at den også bliver den flittigt brugt hos sundhedspersonale, kantinepersonale m.m.

Prøv dem selv – dine fødder vil smile

Name: Tunez Footwear Inc
Description: At TuneZ Footwear, we're redefining the orthopedic footwear industry. Understanding the challenges diabetics face daily, especially with diabetic neuropathy, our shoes are crafted not only for therapeutic comfort but also for style. It pained me to see that a significant portion of the 480 million diabetics globally, particularly those in the image-conscious 18-45 age bracket, had to compromise fashion for comfort. Our shoes are designed with these individuals in mind. Having undergone a personal journey as a recent amputee and type 2 diabetic, I felt a deep-seated need for such a product. Backed by a licensed podiatrist's endorsement, our shoes promise optimum foot health while ensuring wearers feel confident and trendy. We're not just selling footwear; we're providing a fusion of medical expertise, fashion, and personal understanding. This is TuneZ Footwear – where comfort meets style

Description:
Riccon took the first step in the shoe industry with a small workshop in 1958. The designs that started in a classic style were combined with innovative ideas over time and started to meet the consumers in the 1980s as sports shoes, high heels, boots and casual shoes. In the same years, with the increase in the demand for the brand, the production capacity started to increase by means of machinery as well as handicraft production.

Riccon brand was established in İzmir, Turkey in 2014, with the fourth generation members of the family who have turned traditional production into modern, innovative vision and given the highest priority to branding. Riccon brand, which set out to shape the future and become a world brand with its experience; its current exports to Europe, Asia and Africa; with its young, dynamic team and more than twenty designers, is in an effort to produce the best for its customers through experience of four generations.

Nuestra identidad, inspirada en la fuerza y la forja, refleja el compromiso de ofrecer productos capaces de resistir los entornos industriales más exigentes. Desde calzado de seguridad hasta protección especializada, en Vulcan Pro cada equipo es seleccionado bajo los más estrictos estándares internacionales de calidad.

Nuestros Pilares:
. Seguridad Integral: Protegemos lo más valioso de cada organización: su capital humano.

. Innovación en Protección: Buscamos constantemente productos que ofrezcan no solo seguridad, sino también ergonomía para el trabajador.

. Confianza y Respaldo: Somos aliados estratégicos de nuestros clientes, garantizando cumplimiento normativo y durabilidad en cada entrega.

En Vulcan Pro, forjamos un entorno seguro para los profesionales que construyen el futuro.

Description:
The Journey started in 2019, The brand was launched at Paris fashion week previewing SS20, Designed in London and Made in Italy. 
We partnered with designer Mr Baily & design consultants Concept kicks on our first collection. Each product was unbranded except for a subtle tonal embossment on the tongue, and a flash of 3M reflective material at the heel. Inspired by Italian style and quality craftsmanship, but with a British sensibility. All the components of every shoe were sourced within a 20 mile radius of the finishing factory in Civitanova, cutting the limit of our ecological footprint and remaining faithful to our core values. As the brand develops our core product lines are Unisex as well as offering seasonal options for both our Male and Female customers. We continue to offer new styles each season and now work with a small number of suppliers based in Asia and Europe.
Focusing on our local market we work with some of the best retailers in the UK; Selfridges, Liberty, Browns, Flannels, Cruise, Sevenstore & Reiss.

Contemporary minimal branding and the highest quality materials, these modern sneakers provide the perfect combination of fashion and comfort for every lifestyle, from the office to the outdoors.
 Our footwear is made for the more discerning consumer, those that prefer quality over quantity.

Name: MBT Europe - Masai Barefoot Technology
Description:
We named our footwear MBT, and refused to call it a shoe. Because MBT is totally different: * Its sole is curved, not flat. * It is unstable, not stable. * It activates your muscles instead of undermining them. * It has a positive effect on the entire body, not just the feet. In other words: It is the antithesis of a shoe. We call it “The anti-shoe”.

MBT – For The Human Movement A healthy step is the result of a combination of comfort and our body’s efficiency for the ground on which we walk. If we walk on a soft, uneven surface, our muscles move to keep our balance. MBT shoes were born with this purpose: simulating walking barefoot on a natural, non-flat surface. When you put on a pair of our shoes, you instantly realize that you're on the move. We could get extremely scientific about how, but you might be more interested to know why. Our shoes have a unique and patented curved sole with SensorTechnology which promotes a soft heel landing and absorbs harmful shock. The pivot point creates a natural forward rolling movement. MBT now offers a wide array of footwear catered for people with different lifestyle and needs. For those in the service line who are on their feet for long hours to sports enthusiasts who require a shoe for conditioning, running through to recovery. MBT now offers performance running footwear that promotes midfoot striking for short to long distance road running. MBT – For The Human Movement

Why Choose Venezianas?
	•	Artisanal Craftsmanship: Each pair of our Scarpe Originali friulianas is made in Italy by skilled artisans, preserving a legacy of craftsmanship and excellence.
	•	Modern Design with Timeless Elegance: Our collections are inspired by contemporary trends, ensuring that our customers always have a stylish yet comfortable option for any occasion.
	•	Accessible Luxury: We offer premium footwear at an attractive price point, perfect for retailers seeking to provide high-quality, elegant products that resonate with a broad customer base.

Our Vision:
We strive to become a trusted partner for retailers and fashion enthusiasts around the world, expanding our presence in key markets such as France, Italy, and beyond. Our goal is to establish long-lasting relationships with retailers who value exclusivity, quality, and modern elegance.

Join Us:
If you are a retailer or distributor interested in offering unique, high-quality footwear that blends tradition with contemporary style, we would love to connect. Discover how Venezianas can bring a touch of handcrafted elegance to your collection

Name: BZroller UG
Description:
The Future of Children's Footwear

Welcome to BZroller UG 
pioneers of the next generation of roller shoes. Since our inception in 2022, our mission has been to deliver not just shoes, but a completely new experience of movement. Our Breezy Rollers combine design, functionality, and fun, specifically crafted for the active lives of young adventurers.

Innovation and Quality
Our Breezy Rollers are globally recognized for their patented Easy-One-Click System that allows for a seamless transition from a sturdy street shoe to a dynamic roller shoe in seconds – no tools required. This system ensures not only ease of use but also maximum safety with integrated brakes and shock-absorbing materials. Each shoe is the result of rigorous testing and the passion of our dedicated team.

Sustainability and Community Engagement
As part of our mission, we place a high emphasis on sustainability. We utilize eco-friendly materials and produce under ethical conditions. BZroller UG also actively engages in the community by sponsoring children and youth sports events that promote the spirit of mobility and health.

Our Products
Our shoes are available in various appealing designs and colors that not only delight children but also inspire them to stay active. We offer models for different ages and needs, with each shoe designed to grow with the children's feet.

Name: QUADSis Footwear
Description:
QUADSis Footwear is an innovative shoe brand designing & manufacturing stylish, fashion-forward footwear that women and girls can wear all day — for class, work, rush, errands, and everyday life.  “QUADSis: Where Comfort Meets Style”.  

QUAD-Sis was born out of necessity. In 2017, co-founder & CEO, Janet Ward, was shopping for women’s shoes with her daughter, Brooke, 8 yrs old who was wearing women’s size 7. They were looking for a youthful alternative to any of the classic women’s styles that was practical, comfortable, not a 3” heel and was in fun, vibrant, youthful colors in quality materials, & that she could wear ALL DAY. There was simply nothing on the market suitable to her. 
After living this frustration for 3 to 4 years, co-founders, Janet and Stephanie Guido, decided the only alternative was to start their own company & create a footwear brand rooted in the true needs and wants of the market.  Hearing of this struggle from so many friends, moms, colleagues drove us to launch an intentionally designed footwear collection by re-imagining, re-engineering classic styles that are cute, comfortable and are perfect for all day wear. Without sacrificing style or quality, we have combined this need, and all our collection is handcrafted in Brazil using high quality and sustainable materials (leathers, velvets, denim, canvases). 
Our mission: Living through the agony of the fashion & footwear choices available was nothing the founders ever wished for anyone. This fueled a passion to ensure no other girl of any age (child or woman) felt like this. Women of all ages are looking for comfortable, stylish, on-trend footwear without sacrificing style or quality. 
The mission of QUAD-Sis clearly became to create footwear to ensure we can help: Build strength, confidence, self-esteem, and self-fulfillment through footwear choices in classic styles that empower girls & women to make decisions in their style choices with a product that actually fits her body.

Headquartered in Seri Kembangan, Selangor, Kong Brothers Group embarked on its journey in 1980 with a primary focus on serving the Malaysian footwear market. Over the years, they have offered a wide array of shoe choices, ranging from formal office wear to smart casuals, sports, sandals, heels, slip-ons, and more. Their vision is rooted in a simple yet profound idea: to provide every Malaysian with the opportunity to walk comfortably in a pair of high-quality shoes at an affordable price.

As of today, Kong Brothers Group has expanded its reach and influence by owning seven subsidiary brands, operating within both the retail and wholesale sectors. These brands include Green Point Club, Speedy Rhino, 988 Speedy Rhino, Spanner, Noveni, Louis Cuppers and Knight. They have established a strong presence across digital platforms and maintain a network of offline stores throughout Malaysia.

Name: FLEKS Footwear
Description:
Welcome to FLEKS.
 
Motivated by a responsibility to improve the footwear industry, a passion for innovation, a focus on circularity, and the excitement to flex (or “fleks”!) on the status quo…we set out on a journey to build a better flip-flop and beyond.
 
The result is paradigm-shifting footwear that is wildly comfortable, delightfully cool, and sustainably made. 
 
FLEKS is proudly made of up to 85% recycled material — and not just any material. We use top-quality, discarded virgin foam that is engineered and designed to go into performance athletic footwear, but often sadly ends up burned or in landfills. We also use 99% less water compared to traditional EVA manufacturing!
 
We’re not perfect, just better. And we’re committed to always improving. 
 
Together, let’s flip the tide.

Ejet er af Tranemo Advanced Workwear Danmark og med dansk agentur på Puma Safety og Albatros Safety. 

Vi samarbejder tæt med Tranemo Safety Academy, og er vores mission at styrke sikkerheden i danske virksomheder og skabe en tryg og produktiv arbejdskultur. Vi brænder for at være din strategiske partner, der leverer skræddersyede løsninger til din virksomhed.

Hos twwsafety tilbyder vi et nøje udvalgt sortiment af sikkerhedsløsninger fra de førende brands som Puma Safety, Albatros Safety, Eureka, Secra, MySole og Tranemo Advanced Workwear. 

Vores løsninger indeholder flammehæmmende arbejdstøj, PPE så som handsker og hjelme samt sikkerhedssko. 

Som en stolt B2B forhandler med dansk agentur for Puma Safety og Albatros Safety sikrer vi, at du altid får produkter i topkvalitet, som understøtter både funktionalitet og stil.

Name: LOJA CMC TOP VENDAS
Description:
Bem-vindo à CMC Segurança no Trabalho - sua parceira confiável em proteção e conforto ocupacional. Nossa missão é assegurar que você e sua equipe trabalhem com tranquilidade, sabendo que estão protegidos pelos melhores calçados de segurança disponíveis no mercado. Representamos as principais marcas de fabricantes como Marluvas, Bracol e Crival, garantindo que a qualidade e a segurança estejam sempre em primeiro lugar.
Com um galpão de distribuição estrategicamente localizado na zona leste de São Paulo é o centro de operações que nos permite garantir prontidão na entrega e atendimento ágil. Fornecemos o melhor em calçados de segurança, tanto para o consumidor final quanto para revendas. Com uma capacidade excepcional de atendimento, estamos prontos para suprir sua demanda, independentemente do tamanho.
Na CMC, acreditamos que segurança não deve ser comprometida e que preço não deve ser um obstáculo para a proteção adequada. Oferecemos os melhores preços e opções de entrega rápida para que você possa receber seus produtos quando mais precisa. Somos mais do que apenas uma empresa - somos parceiros comprometidos com a sua segurança e sucesso.
Venha nos conhecer e descubra por que somos a escolha preferida de profissionais em São Paulo. CMC Segurança no Trabalho: Temos o melhor para você.

Name: Virtue Leather Handcraft
Description:
Virtue Leather Handcrafts is a Ugandan social enterprise dedicated to transforming lives through premium, handcrafted leather goods. We address the challenge of market access, undervalued local artisan talent, and the imperative to build trust in "Made in Uganda" quality across the leather sector.


We partner directly with skilled artisans, providing fair wages, consistent work, and a platform to showcase their unparalleled craftsmanship. Each product is a testament to timeless design, superior comfort, and enduring durability, meticulously made from ethical Ugandan leather.

Our model creates a powerful ripple effect:

Empowering Livelihoods: Ensuring stable income for artisan families.

Preserving Heritage: Sustaining traditional leatherworking techniques.

Driving Quality & Trust: Setting new standards for local leather products.

Fostering Sustainable Growth: Championing ethical production and circularity.

Our Visual Storytelling Project will amplify these human stories and our commitment to excellence. We seek impact-driven investors and strategic partners passionate about sustainable enterprise and artisan empowerment.

Join us in crafting legacies together.

From its humble beginnings to becoming a thriving global operation, WH Supply continues to focus on innovation, service, and reliability.

The journey of WH Supply highlights a dedication to helping businesses remain competitive and successful in an ever-changing marketplace.

We believe our products would be a great addition to your market, offering both quality and affordability to your customers,  thus promoting the purchase of high-quality leather shoes that are durable and have a longer lifespan reducing the need for frequent replacements, as well.

Name: PLUSHY Footwear
Description:
PLUSHY Footwear is a women’s footwear brand that combines feminine elegance with maximum comfort, designed with attention to three key areas: upper, insole, and outsole. The upper uses soft inner velvet lining for flexibility and gentle touch. The insole features tailored latex foam for cushioned support, anatomically designed to fill gaps under the feet. The outsole uses full rubber for strong durability and anti-slip properties. PLUSHY also uses high-quality synthetic patent leather with a protective coating, making it easy to clean from dust and liquids, while ensuring an elegant finish. Strong adhesive formulas guarantee long-lasting bond and wear resistance.

PLUSHY launched its first collection under the name POSH Collection, featuring three models: Flair Slip-On Sandals, Viola Mules, and Belle Ballet Shoes. Each pair is available in timeless neutral colors (white, black, beige) as well as special limited tones for Volume 1: maroon and soft pink. Every design is accented with a bow, while Viola and Belle models include straps for added elegance. The Belle Ballet Shoes also include an adjustable buckle for a better, more secure fit.

Name: Infiny Maria
Description:
Infiny Maria est née d'une volonté d'inclusion, en offrant des chaussures grandes tailles à des prix accessibles pour tous les budgets. Nous avons constaté combien il est difficile pour de nombreuses jeunes femmes de trouver des chaussures à la fois confortables et stylées dans les grandes tailles, un besoin souvent ignoré par la fast fashion et les grandes marques.

Notre boutique se spécialise exclusivement dans les chaussures à partir de la taille 43, et jusqu'aux tailles les plus grandes dès que possible. Nous voulons montrer que la diversité des morphologies ne s'arrête pas à la taille 41, contrairement à ce que pensent 90 à 95 % des marques. Infiny Maria cherche à briser ce plafond de verre en offrant des options de qualité pour les femmes aux grands pieds, tout aussi normales que celles qui portent des tailles plus petites.

Combien de femmes se retrouvent contraintes de se tourner vers le rayon hommes faute de choix ? Cela constitue une atteinte à leur féminité et une forme de discrimination que nous combattons. Chez Infiny Maria, nous célébrons la diversité des morphologies du pied, y compris les pieds larges, qui évoluent souvent en fonction des changements corporels de la vie.

Nous nous engageons à rendre la mode accessible à toutes les femmes en proposant des lots issus de déstockages, permettant ainsi de bénéficier de prix attractifs. Il ne s'agit pas de proposer des articles de moindre qualité, mais de permettre à chaque femme de trouver des chaussures féminines, confortables, et sans compromis.

Infiny Maria, c'est bien plus qu'une simple boutique. C'est une déclaration d'amour pour toutes les femmes aux grands pieds, une revendication pour la reconnaissance de leur diversité, de leur féminité, et de la normalité de toutes les morphologies.

Name: RTC Brand-First Clearance Solutions
Description:
RTC Clearance Solutions was founded by a handful of ex-adidas, Reebok, and Puma operators who spent decades wrestling with one stubborn problem—what to do with great product that just won’t move. We know how excess stock clogs cash flow, strains DC space, and chips away at hard-earned brand equity, because we’ve lived it from the inside.

Today, we flip that headache into found money.

Our boutique team runs a vetted global buyer network across LATAM, EMEA, APAC, and North America. Every deal is cash-before-collection, every placement is contract-controlled, and every shipment is tracked until the last box lands in a brand-safe channel. No grey market leaks, no race-to-the-bottom pricing—just clean exits, clear warehouses, and capital back on your balance sheet in weeks, not quarters.

Mission
Free brands to focus on the next season’s hero line—not last season’s leftovers—while upholding the standards that made those brands iconic in the first place.

What Sets Us Apart
	• Brand-side DNA – Strategy shaped by 130 + years of combined in-house experience.
	• Zero Credit Risk – 100 % of funds secured before goods leave your dock.
	• Global Eyes-on-the-Ground – Local market compliance and channel policing.
	• Hands-On, Not Hands-Off – You deal directly with the principals, no endless hand-offs.

We’ve been in your shoes. Let us clear the path so you can run lighter and farther.

Name: Galadonna Shoes
Description:
GALADONNA SHOES: %100 Doğal Deri Ayakkabılarla Şık ve Kalitenin Adresi

GALADONNA SHOES olarak, ayaklarınızı doğal ve özgün bir şekilde kucaklayan %100 deri ayakkabılar sunuyoruz. Ayakkabılarımızda bulunan kaliteli deri malzemeler ve titiz işçiliğimizle, size mükemmel bir kullanım olan şıklığı ve kalıcı bir arada sunuyoruz.

Doğal derinin eşsiz özelliklerini ve ayaklarınıza maksimum konforu elde etmek istiyorsanız, GALADONNA SHOES doğru adres! Her bir ayakkabımızda kaliteden fayda sağlamak için en iyi deri materyalleri yapacağız. Derinin doğal özelliklerini koruyarak ayaklarınızın nefeslerini ve rahatlarını sergilediler. Böylece, uzun saatler boyunca ayaklarınızın yorgunluğunu hissetmeden hareket edebilirsiniz.

GALADONNA SHOES, tasarımlarında da özgünlüğü ve zarafeti bir araya getiriyor. Her bir ayakkabımız, bir araya toplanmış trendler ve moda akımlarıyla harmanlanarak ortaya çıkıyor. Şık detaylar, zarif dikişler ve özel işlemeler, ayakkabılarımızın karakteri ve benzersizlik katıyor. Name: Buci barefoot I barefoot batai
Description:
Vis dažniau girdime sąvoką barefoot batai, tačiau ką ji iš tiesų reiškia ir kuo tokia avalynė skiriasi nuo įprastų batų? Trumpai tariant, barefoot batai – tai minimalistinė avalynė, sukurta imituoti vaikščiojimą basomis. Tai avalynė, kuri leidžia pėdai judėti natūraliai, be spaudimo, be dirbtinės atramos ar padų formavimų.

Pagrindinės barefoot batų savybės

Barefoot batai pasižymi keliomis esminėmis savybėmis:

Plonas ir lankstus padas: leidžia pėdai jausti paviršių, aktyvina pėdų raumenis ir stiprina natūralią amortizaciją.

Platus pėdos priekis: suteikia pirštams pakankamai vietos, kad jie galėtų išsiskleisti ir dirbti taip, kaip gamta numatė.

Zero drop (nulio kulno pakilimas): padas yra vienodo storio nuo kulno iki pirštų, tad kūnas išlieka natūralioje padėtyje.

Be dirbtinės atramos: barefoot batai neskatina pėdos tingumo – priešingai, jie stiprina jos funkcijas.

Kam skirti barefoot batai?

Barefoot batai tinka tiek suaugusiems, tiek vaikams. Suaugusieji dažnai juos renkasi dėl sveikatos – siekia sumažinti pėdų, kelių ar nugaros skausmus, pagerinti laikyseną ar tiesiog jaustis laisviau.
Tuo tarpu vaikams barefoot avalynė yra ypač svarbi, nes jų pėdos dar vystosi. Dėl per kietos ar netinkamos avalynės dažnai formuojasi pėdos deformacijos, kurios vėliau gali turėti įtakos visai laikysenai.

Barefoot batai leidžia vaikų pėdoms augti laisvai, be spaudimo ir su natūraliu raumenų aktyvumu.

Kodėl verta rinktis barefoot batus?

Tyrimai ir praktika rodo, kad barefoot batai:

padeda stiprinti pėdų raumenis,

gerina pusiausvyrą ir koordinaciją,

sumažina plokščiapėdystės riziką,

gali sumažinti ar visai pašalinti įvairius skausmus (padų fascitas, nuospaudos, įtampa kojose),

skatina sąmoningą ir aktyvų judėjimą.

Be to, žmonės, avintys barefoot batus, dažnai pastebi, kad jų eisena tampa lengvesnė.

MooseLog is part of Euron Group Inc., a Toronto based footwear company founded in 2003 with long term experience in footwear.

Our focus

Name: ReRun
Description:
"At ReRun, we've revolutionized the running shoe industry with a circular, zero-waste subscription model designed to cater to the needs of avid runners. Traditional wisdom suggests replacing your running shoes every 6-8 months, which can quickly become a costly and environmentally unfriendly habit. That's where we step in to provide a smarter and more eco-conscious solution. 

 

Our unique approach centers on sustainability and convenience. When you subscribe to ReRun, you're not just getting a pair of running shoes; you're joining a movement that prioritizes both your wallet and the planet. Here's how it works: 

 

1. Circular Footwear: We've harnessed cutting-edge technology to create running shoes that are completely circular, meaning they can be endlessly recycled. This not only reduces the environmental impact of shoe production but also ensures that your old running shoes won't end up in landfills. 

 

2. Subscription Convenience: Once you become a ReRun subscriber, we've got your back every step of the way. Say goodbye to the hassle of searching for replacement shoes. As soon as your current pair starts to wear down, we take them back. It's as easy as sending an old pair back in a prepaid envelope. 

 

3. New Shoes, Hassle-Free: After we've worked our magic, we promptly send you a brand-new pair of running shoes, so you can continue your running journey without interruption. You'll always have high-quality, comfortable footwear ready for action. 

 

So, for all you fellow running enthusiasts, here's the deal: Join us in pushing the boundaries of your running potential, all while making an eco-conscious and economical choice. ReRun is your partner in running beyond limits, sustainably and cost-effectively. It's time to lace up and stride into a greener, more convenient running future with ReRun."

Name: Levent Aksin Ayakkabıcılık Sanayi ve Ticaret Limited Şirketi
Description:
As Levent Aksin Shoe Industry and Trade Limited Company, we produce men's shoes in Turkey. Our company adventure; It started with apprenticeship in 1974 and continued with mastery of counter in 1979. With the first step taken in 1987, we started to produce shoes entirely by hand in small looms. Our production started with 50 pairs per week and continued to increase every year.
In 2009, we established "Aksin Shoe Materials Industry and Trade Limited Company" by increasing our quality in order to eliminate the supply problem of Gaziantep materials and to provide better quality service to our customers.
Later on, we established our own leather factory "Aksin Leather Industry and Trade Limited Company" in 2014.
Thus, in the shoe industry;
In manufacturing; "Aksin Shoe Industry Trade Limited Company"
 
Leather too; "Aksin Leather Industry Industry Trade Limited Company"
 
In the sub-industry; "Aksin Shoe Industry Materials Manufacturing Industry Trade Limited Company"
 
We continue to offer a single brand to our customers by combining the three branches of production in the shoe industry.
 
Under the leadership of qualified craftsmen, we sell domestically and abroad with quality production.
We are currently working with 28 countries. We produce for both our own brand and world brands such as BEYMEN, ELLE, DERIMOD, NETWORK. We would like to work with you too. We have the power to produce according to the criteria you want. We would like to discuss this matter with you in more detail.

Name: Mori Shoes
Description:
Mori is a circular children’s sneaker company focused on sustainability and reducing waste without sacrificing foot health or everyday function. Our name means “forest” in Japanese, reflecting our commitment to protecting natural resources through smarter design and circularity.

Children outgrow shoes long before they wear them out. Most pairs end up in landfill or as low-value downcycled material. We address this with a closed-loop model: when a child outgrows a pair, parents return it. We recover and process the materials, then rebuild them into a new pair rather than letting them go to waste. The aim is simple: keep materials in use for longer and cut production impact with every cycle.

We design for natural foot development, durability, and comfort, because sustainability is worthless if the product does not perform. Our approach challenges the throwaway model that dominates children’s footwear and provides parents with a credible alternative that does not compromise on health or function.

Our goal is to prove that circularity can be practical, scalable, and desirable. By rebuilding rather than discarding, we reduce material waste, extend product life, and build a more responsible future for children’s footwear. Mori represents a shift away from fast, disposable shoes towards design that respects both growth and the environment.

Name: VICTORIA SENKPIEL
Description:
VICTORIA SENKPIEL shoes are created from passion: passion for wildlife conservation, championing the story of endangered animals, and passion for creating shoes that, like the animals they depict and the women that wear them, are rare, beautiful, and elegant.

VICTORIA SENKPIEL shoes captured media headlines back in 2015 when Sweden’s Crown Princess Victoria became the first ambassador to wear the brand, embodying the spirit of an authentic and strong female leader.  Our Founder is a classically trained ballet dancer with a vision to empower women by re-creating the proportions and beauty of elongated ballerina lines, combining them with orthopedic expertise in both the aesthetic design and structure of the shoe. To achieve this level of quality and beauty, each pair of shoes is handcrafted by our artisans in Northern Italy. 

The unique attributes of each animal selected for the Victoria Senkpiel collection are featured in the design, highlighting its strengths and the threats facing them as an endangered species.

Combining the elegance of the ballerina with the power of the animal portrayed by the shoe, Victoria Senkpiel seeks to empower those who wear her shoes to radiate their own intrinsic strength and personal style. That is the power of great shoes. 

All profits from each pair of Victoria Senkpiel shoes are donated to a carefully handpicked foundation dedicated to the animal portrayed by the shoe. 

The brand sells through selected stores and via its website - www.victoriasenkpiel.com. The brand is currently looking to expand its international distribution.

Our commitment to quality and innovation shines through in every pair we produce, combining traditional techniques with modern design. Each shoe is crafted in our state-of-the-art facilities, ensuring that it meets the highest standards of durability and style.

Name: Chaussures Ferragaicomo Inc.
Description:
Chaussures FerraGiacomo Inc. is a Canadian family-owned distributor of premium made footwear. From its Montreal HQ the company imports three heritage brands—A.S.98, Mjus & Relife—and supplies exclusive collections to independent boutiques and specialty shoe retailers coast-to-coast.

Founded three decades ago by the late Colagiacomo patriarch, the firm forged trust through long-standing ties with Italian artisans and rigorous quality control. After his sudden passing in 2018, stewardship moved to his children Liana (21) and Luca (19), who paused university to modernize the business while honoring their father’s vision.

Today FerraGiacomo blends tradition with data-driven retail support:
• Direct-to-consumer halo – as98.ca fuels national buzz and in-store traffic.
• Sell-through focus – assortments planned on Canadian data lower markdown risk.
• Fast restocks – Montreal warehouse ships in 2–4 days; no reorder minimums after a 6-8 pair opener. Depending on the brand.
• Marketing muscle – co-op social assets, influencer collabs & geo-targeted ads handed to partners.
• Healthy margins – ≈2.4× keystone protected by strict price-integrity monitoring.
• White-glove service – Luca & Liana personally provide bilingual (EN/FR) support, staff training & flexible terms.

Mission: to fuse generational craftsmanship with modern retail tools, delivering footwear that unites style, comfort & authenticity while championing Canadian independent retail.

Ready to refresh your assortment? Book a virtual line showing or request look books:

 as98.ca |  luca@ferragiacomo.com liana@ferragiacomo.com |  +1 514 325 9363

Name: G&G GROUP SRL
Description:
Benvenuti nel mondo Gold&Gold! Siamo un'azienda appassionata di calzature, abbigliamento ed accessori, pronti a trasformare il tuo guardaroba in un autentico scrigno di emozioni.

 Ogni passo che compi sarà un'opera d'arte, grazie alle nostre calzature che uniscono stile e comfort. Dai tacchi glamour alle sneakers alla moda, ogni creazione è pensata per farti sentire unica e radiosa.

 Il nostro abbigliamento abbraccia la tua personalità, trasformando ogni giorno in un'occasione speciale. Dalla semplicità sofisticata agli outfit audaci, troverai capi che raccontano la tua storia con eleganza e passione.

 Gli accessori che proponiamo sono il tocco finale al tuo look. Borse, gioielli, cappelli e altro ancora: ogni dettaglio è curato per permetterti di esprimere la tua vera essenza.

 La moda è il linguaggio silenzioso che parla al tuo cuore, e noi siamo qui per tradurlo in creazioni che risvegliano emozioni. Lasciati avvolgere dalla nostra esperienza di shopping che va oltre le semplici transazioni. Il nostro team ti accoglierà  e consiglierà con passione e competenza, guidandoti verso le scelte che rispecchiano al meglio le tue esigenze.

 Con noi, ogni giorno è un'opportunità per esprimere la tua vera essenza. Entra nel nostro mondo e lasciati trasportare dalla magia delle nostre creazioni, dove lo stile diventa un messaggio di emozioni e autenticità.

Name: StreetSense.cz
Description:
Jsme tým plný mladých odhodlaných jedinců, kteří sdílí vášeň pro tenisky a street kulturu. Naše odvaha čelit výzvám nás pohání vpřed, a to s cílem přinést ti to nejlepší, co se na trhu aktuálně vyskytuje.

V naší široké nabídce najdeš rozmanitý výběr tenisek všeho druhu, zahrnující limitované edice, vyprodané modely, vzácné sběratelské kousky i pohodlné tenisky pro každodenní nošení. A to od značek Air Jordan, Nike, Yeezy, Adidas, Supreme, Vans, New Balance a spoustu dalších značek i kolaborací.

Náš přístup je odlišný od ostatních, a to se snažíme promítat do všeho, co děláme a tvoříme. Právě proto máme vlastního maskota, který má za úkol spojovat tě s námi všude tam, kde ho uvidíš. Maskot nás nejen odlišuje od ostatních, ale také slouží jako symbol našeho inovativního přístupu k tvorbě a kreativitě. Jeho přítomnost má vytvářet jedinečný zážitek a spojení mezi tebou a naší značkou.

Stojíme si za tím, že KAŽDÁ TENISKA MÁ SVŮJ VLASTNÍ PŘÍBĚH.
Objevuj nová místa a vykroč za nevšedními zážitky v teniskách, které tě budou hnát svým vlastním příběhem. Tvoříme prostor pro komunitu lidí, ve kterém se limit stává pouhým slovem.

Name: Sneaker Totaal
Description:
Welkom bij Sneaker Totaal, dé one-stop-shop voor alle sneaker liefhebbers! Wij zijn een team van gepassioneerde sneakerfanaten die zich inzetten om jou de meest exclusieve en modieuze sneakers te bieden. Onze missie is om sneakerliefhebbers en verzamelaars een betrouwbare en gemakkelijke plek te bieden om hun favoriete sneakers te kopen en te verkennen.

Sneaker Totaal is opgericht om mijn passie voor sneakers delen met anderen. Wat begon als een kleine hobby, is uitgegroeid tot een bloeiende onderneming die voortdurend streeft naar uitmuntendheid op het gebied van kwaliteit, service en stijl. Wij zijn trots op ons uitgebreide assortiment van zowel klassieke als limited edition sneakers, met een focus op de meest iconische merken zoals Nike, Adidas, Yeezy en meer!

Ons team bestaat uit ervaren professionals met een achtergrond in zowel de sneakerbranche als de mode-industrie. Dankzij onze uitgebreide kennis en passie voor sneakers kunnen wij onze klanten de beste kwaliteit en de meest up-to-date modellen aanbieden. Wij werken nauw samen met gerenommeerde merken en vertrouwde leveranciers om ervoor te zorgen dat onze klanten de beste producten tegen de beste prijzen krijgen.

Bij Sneaker Totaal begrijpen we dat elke sneakerliefhebber uniek is en dat smaken en stijlen kunnen variëren. Daarom bieden we een breed scala aan sneakers aan, zodat er voor ieder wat wils is. Ons assortiment omvat zowel klassieke, tijdloze modellen als de nieuwste trends en limited edition releases. Of je nu op zoek bent naar een casual, alledaagse sneaker of een zeldzame en gewilde release, Sneaker Totaal heeft het allemaal.

Klanttevredenheid staat bij ons hoog in het vaandel en we streven ernaar om een uitzonderlijke winkelervaring te bieden. Onze gebruiksvriendelijke website maakt het eenvoudig om jouw perfecte paar sneakers te vinden, en ons deskundige klantenserviceteam staat klaar om je te helpen met eventuele vragen of problemen die je tijdens het bestellen hebt!

Name: ZM Suppliers

Step into Success with ZM Suppliers! 

Welcome to ZM Suppliers, your trusted partner for premium footwear solutions. With over two decades of industry expertise, we bring a wealth of knowledge and innovation to every project, ensuring that schools receive the highest quality footwear for their students.

Our commitment to innovation drives us to stay ahead of the curve, offering cutting-edge designs and technologies that prioritize comfort, durability, and style. From Krishnagiri to Salem and Tiruppur District, our reputation for excellence precedes us, with over 50 schools relying on us for their footwear needs.

What sets us apart is our dedication to providing a hassle-free experience for schools. From seamless end-to-end delivery processes to our unwavering commitment to trusted quality, we ensure that schools can focus on what matters most: nurturing their students' growth and success.

Partnering with ZM Suppliers not only ensures exceptional footwear but also offers schools the opportunity to boost their revenue. With our partnership program, schools can earn a generous 10% commission from the MRP of each pair sold, providing a valuable source of additional income.

Choose ZM Suppliers for footwear solutions that exceed expectations and empower schools to step confidently into the future. Let's embark on this journey together and make a difference, one step at a time.

Name: Central Team Global
Description:
For over 40 years, Central Team Global has served as the trusted manufacturing arm for the world's leading footwear brands. We bridge the gap between design and delivery, helping brands navigate the complexities of the modern global supply chain.

Check us out: https://www.ct-global.net/

Our Mission To provide stability, quality, and scalability in an unpredictable market. We do not just find factories; we manage the entire production lifecycle to mitigate risk, ensure ethical compliance, and guarantee on-time delivery.

Our Footprint We operate a diversified manufacturing network designed for resilience and cost-optimization. Our partners are located in:
- China
- Laos
- Cambodia
- Sri Lanka
- Kenya

This multi-region approach allows us to offer competitive pricing and geopolitical flexibility, giving our clients true supply chain security. Our offices are strategically located close to our partners to ensure efficient responses for our clients.

Who We Help We serve a global clientele with distinct needs:
- Major Retailers: We possess the infrastructure, heritage, and rigorous compliance expertise required to serve global giants like Walmart, TJMaxx, and NEXT.
- Scaling DTC Brands: We assist ambitious founders in moving from boutique production to mass scale. We solve the common pitfalls of "going direct"—such as high MOQs, communication gaps, and quality inconsistencies—acting as your on-the-ground experts.

Why Central Team Global? Manufacturing is about more than just the lowest price; it is about reliability. With four decades of heritage, we combine deep industry relationships with agile, modern solutions. Whether you are looking to open new business lines or diversify your current sourcing strategy, we ensure your product meets the standards your customers expect.

Let us build your footwear supply chain  https://www.ct-global.net/

Name: Diverkids Shoes
Description:
Nuestra línea de productos refleja nuestro compromiso con la calidad y la sostenibilidad, utilizando materiales actuales y respetuosos con la naturaleza para crear zapatos que no solo son elegantes, sino también responsables con el planeta. Desde zapatillas deportivas confeccionadas con materiales reciclados hasta botas de piel tratada de manera sostenible, cada par de zapatos está diseñado pensando en el futuro de nuestros hijos y el del medio ambiente.

En DiverKids Shoes, no solo nos preocupamos por el aspecto de nuestros productos, sino también por su impacto en el mundo que los rodea. Nuestros zapatos infantiles están diseñados para proporcionar comodidad y apoyo a los pequeños pies en crecimiento, al tiempo que promueven un estilo de vida activo y saludable.

Al colaborar con DiverKids Shoes, no solo estará adquiriendo productos de alta calidad, sino también uniéndose a una causa más grande: la creación de un mundo más sostenible y respetuoso con la naturaleza para las generaciones futuras. Únase a nosotros en este emocionante viaje y descubra la belleza, la calidad y la responsabilidad de DiverKids Shoes. Estamos aquí para caminar juntos hacia un futuro más brillante y sostenible!

Name: Marieta & Co
Description:
Marieta es una marca chilena que nació de la necesidad de tener zapatos de calidad, de cuero, atemporales, cómodos, femeninos y con un estilo marcado.
 
La marca esta pensada en mujeres que buscan un zapato de calidad y valoran el trabajo chileno.
 
Un zapato atemporal es un zapato que puedes usar hoy como en 3 años mas, ya que no es un zapato de moda. 
 
Buscamos y creamos diseños únicos, simples y elegantes a la vez que no tengan segmentación por edad y puedan ser versátiles en tu día dia.
 
Fabricamos todos nuestros zapatos en Chile por artesanos con mas de 50 años de experiencia.
 
Utilizamos cueros de la mejor calidad seleccionados exclusivamente para cada modelo.
 
Nuestra misión es tener modelos únicos cada temporada que quieran ser usados una y otra vez por sus dueñas, inspirando a otras querer comprar unos Marieta.

Description:

Our products are crafted with high-quality EVA and silicone materials, designed for everyday wear and all-day comfort. At Glissers, we believe that every step should feel good — whether you’re at home, outdoors, or on the go.

Name: Bases Balc Calzados
Description:
En Bases Balc somos una industria nacional con más de 30 años de trayectoria, especializada en la producción de calzado inyectado a gran escala.
Fusionamos tecnología, experiencia y un sistema productivo de alto rendimiento para fabricar sandalias, ojotas y calzado esencial que acompaña la vida diaria de miles de personas en todo el país.

Desde nuestras propias bases hasta trabajos a medida para distintas marcas, garantizamos calidad, resistencia y un proceso de fabricación eficiente. Nuestra producción combina maquinaria de última generación con equipos expertos, asegurando modelos funcionales, cómodos y listos para una alta rotación.

En Bases Balc no solo fabricamos calzado: generamos soluciones accesibles para mayoristas, comercios y consumidores que buscan productos confiables y a buen precio. Nos motiva mejorar continuamente, ampliar nuestra capacidad y seguir impulsando la industria nacional con calzado práctico, duradero y pensado para todos.

Bases Balc.
Industria nacional. Calzado que no para.
